objects.description: [MirrorFace](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1054) has used `cmd.exe` for malware execution, file discovery, and manual file manipulation.(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha NOV 2024)(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha Updates APR 2025)(Citation: JPCERT MirrorFace JUL 2024)(Citation: JPCERT MirrorFace JUL 2024)
